headline: Do Options Traders Know Something About Investors in Electronic Arts Stock We Don't?
summary: Investors need to pay close attention to EA stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

headline: Rewrite the Grid: EA SPORTS™ Reveals F1® 25: 2026 Season Pack
summary: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., May 20, 2026--Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) invites players to rewrite the grid in the all-new 2026 Season Pack* for EA SPORTS’™ F1® 25, the official video game of the 2026 FIA Formula One World Championship™, coming to PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S and PC on June 3, 2026. The 2026 Season Pack welcomes in a groundbreaking new era of F1®, featuring the updated rules and regulations for the 2026 F1® season, the introduction of two teams: Audi & Cadillac, and their driver
